message:
Use directive syntax for asides and stop tracking generated files

Replace Aside component imports with :::tip directive syntax in the
OCSF generator and workflows index. Also untrack src/ocsf-version.mjs
which is already in .gitignore and should only be generated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1061,11 +1061,11 @@ title: OCSF
 description: Reference documentation for the Open Cybersecurity Schema Framework (OCSF).
 ---
 
-import { Aside, CardGrid, LinkCard } from "@astrojs/starlight/components";
+import { CardGrid, LinkCard } from "@astrojs/starlight/components";
 
-<Aside type="tip" title="AI-Optimized Documentation">
+:::tip[AI-Optimized Documentation]
 This reference is optimized for AI agents.
-</Aside>
+:::
 
 This reference provides comprehensive documentation for the
 [Open Cybersecurity Schema Framework (OCSF)](https://ocsf.io), an open standard

@@ -3,11 +3,11 @@ title: Workflows
 description: AI-executable workflow prompts for common tasks
 ---
 
-import { Aside, LinkButton } from '@astrojs/starlight/components';
+import { LinkButton } from '@astrojs/starlight/components';
 
-<Aside type="tip" title="AI-Optimized Documentation">
+:::tip[AI-Optimized Documentation]
 This reference is optimized for AI agents.
-</Aside>
+:::
 
 This section contains workflow prompts that AI agents execute directly. Each
 workflow is a verbatim prompt with phased instructions.

@@ -1,3 +0,0 @@
-// OCSF version configuration.
-// Auto-updated by scripts/sync-ocsf.mjs - do not edit manually.
-export const OCSF_VERSION = "1-7-0";
